nits: output_dispatch_summary publish was outside the per-channel try/catch; a DB blip during shutdown could lose per-channel results. → Fixed by wrapping the summary emit in its own try/catch.
Runner opens a second postgres client for PgQuotaStore even though Publisher already holds one against the same DATABASE_URL — could share. Style only.
normalizeRunStatus over-accepts string inputs because RunFinalStatus is a literal union — over-defensive but harmless.
Could log a redacted line on summary-emit failure; runner already does, so deferred.
